description.en: Add a comment to a GitHub issue or pull request. Supports Markdown formatting.

description.it: Add a comment to a GitHub issue or pull request. Supports Markdown formatting.

vars.API_KEY: env:GITHUB_TOKEN|Get your personal access token from https://github.com/settings/tokens
